ogTitle: Boatswain Point vs Bockelberg: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boatswain Point and Bockelberg.
heading: Boatswain Point vs Bockelberg — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boatswain Point, South Australia and Bockelberg, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bockelberg has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Boatswain Point (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boatswain Point or Bockelberg safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boatswain Point has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Bockelberg scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boatswain Point scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Bockelberg scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boatswain Point or Bockelberg?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bockelberg has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
